title: rubus aureolus
intro: Rubus aureolus, also known as the golden bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, characterized by its yellow berries and thorny stems. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus aureolus include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Rubus aureolus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
